revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Japanese new religions]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Japanese new religions]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: more imports
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Japanese new religions]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Japanese new religions]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect[[en:Template" to "#redirect[[:en:Template"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Japanese new religions]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Japanese new religions]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
